nasb.text: And they began to discuss among themselves which one of them it might be who was going to do this thing.

esv.text: And they began to question one another, which of them it could be who was going to do this.

cnv.text: 於是，門徒彼此對問，他們中間誰要作這事。

ccb.text: 他们开始彼此追问谁会出卖耶稣。

csbs.text: 于是他们开始彼此议论，他们当中究竟是谁会做这事。
